zh.title: 关于国王税案的三个不寻常之处

title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
summary: The U.S. launched military strikes against Iran after the Trump administration accused Tehran of violating a ceasefire agreement in the Strait of Hormuz. The strikes occurred during an agreed 60-day period of no hostilities while both nations hold peace talks.
content: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.

zh.summary: 在特朗普政府指控伊朗违反霍尔木兹海峡停火协议后，美国对伊朗发动了军事打击。这些打击发生在双方同意的60天无敌对期间，当时两国正在进行和平谈判。

title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
summary: Oracle experienced its worst week since the 2001 dot-com crash as investors worry about the company's escalating AI spending, negative free cash flow, and $130 billion debt burden. The decline reflects broader questions about whether massive AI investments will generate adequate returns.
content: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.

zh.title: 甲骨文股票经历自2001年互联网泡沫以来最糟糕的一周，AI融资担忧升级
zh.summary: 由于投资者担心甲骨文公司不断升级的AI支出、负自由现金流和1300亿美元债务负担，甲骨文经历了自2001年互联网泡沫以来最糟糕的一周。这种下跌反映了人们对大规模AI投资是否会产生足够回报的更广泛疑问。

title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
summary: China's Zhipu AI model GLM 5.2 is narrowing the performance gap with U.S. leaders Anthropic and OpenAI, as competition shifts toward delivering maximum intelligence per dollar. With U.S. models facing export restrictions, open-source alternatives are becoming increasingly competitive.
content: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.

zh.title: 中国智谱AI在Anthropic和OpenAI受限的情况下逼近美国顶级AI模型

title: ServiceNow, Salesforce and other software stocks surge as the OpenAI threat weakens
summary: Software stocks like ServiceNow and Salesforce surged as investor concerns about OpenAI's dominance faded, while Oracle lagged due to its dependency on OpenAI's cloud infrastructure. The rally reflects a broadening of AI-driven valuations beyond a single dominant player.
content: Oracle’s stock missed out on the broader software rally, as the company is tied to OpenAI’s success through its cloud-infrastructure business.

zh.title: 随着OpenAI威胁减弱，ServiceNow、Salesforce等软件股票飙升

zh.summary: 2025年冒充诈骗连续第五年成为向FTC提交的欺诈投诉之首，占报告的159亿美元总欺诈损失中的35亿美元。

title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: SpaceX, Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Crocs, Microsoft, Robinhood & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant recommendations on key stocks including SpaceX, Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, and others during Friday trading.
content: Here are Friday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周五最大的分析师评级：SpaceX、英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、Crocs、微软、Robinhood及更多
zh.summary: 周五交易期间，华尔街主要分析师对包括SpaceX、英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、微软等在内的关键股票发布了重要建议。

title: OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as companies shift from tokenmaxxing to efficiency
summary: As companies pivot from maximizing AI token consumption to prioritizing efficiency and return on investment, OpenAI and Anthropic face potential growth slowdowns in the evolving AI market.
content: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.

zh.title: OpenAI和Anthropic面临新的AI现实，公司从代币最大化转向效率优先
zh.summary: 随着公司从最大化AI代币消费转向优先考虑效率和投资回报，OpenAI和Anthropic在不断演变的AI市场中面临潜在的增长放缓。

title: Goldman Sachs says buy this gambling stock, sees it adding to its sharp 2026 gains
summary: Goldman Sachs initiated coverage of a gaming stock with a buy rating, forecasting the stock to build on its strong 2026 performance.
content: The investment bank initiated coverage of the gaming name with a buy rating.

zh.title: 高盛表示买入这只博彩股票，认为其将继续2026年的强劲涨幅
zh.summary: 高盛对一只博彩股票启动覆盖，给予买入评级，预测该股将继续其强劲的2026年表现。

title: Micron’s stock is still dirt cheap. Some analysts say that’s about to change.
summary: New long-term customer agreements position Micron to overcome investor concerns about financial sustainability, potentially ending the memory chipmaker's undervaluation.
content: New long-term customer agreements could bring more predictability to Micron’s financials, addressing a persistent investor concern about sustainability.

zh.title: 美光的股票仍然便宜得离谱。一些分析师表示这即将改变。
zh.summary: 新的长期客户协议使美光能够克服投资者对财务可持续性的担忧，可能结束这家芯片制造商的低估状态。

title: Polymarket annualized revenue surpasses $1 billion six weeks after its U.S. exchange launch
summary: Polymarket's prediction market platform achieved $1 billion in annualized revenue within six weeks of its U.S. exchange launch, driven by World Cup trading volume and expanded user access.
content: World Cup trading and the end of its U.S. waitlist are driving rapid growth for Polymarket's prediction market platform.

zh.title: Polymarket年化收入在美国交易所上线六周后突破10亿美元
zh.summary: Polymarket的预测市场平台在美国交易所上线六周内实现了10亿美元的年化收入，由世界杯交易量和扩展的用户访问驱动。

title: Rise in memory chip costs puts pressure on retailers of laptops and smartphones
summary: AI-driven demand competition for memory chips has created a global shortage, pushing up consumer electronics prices and threatening product availability for laptops and smartphones.
content: As the global race for AI moves forward, a shortage of memory chips has begun to drive up prices of consumer electronics and may lead to product shortages.

zh.title: 内存芯片成本上升对笔记本电脑和智能手机零售商构成压力
zh.summary: 人工智能驱动的内存芯片需求竞争造成全球短缺，推高了消费电子产品价格，威胁笔记本电脑和智能手机的产品供应。

title: Oil heads for another losing week, but analyst warns sluggish Strait of Hormuz traffic could send price soaring again
summary: Oil prices face downward pressure this week, but potential shipping disruptions at the Strait of Hormuz—where Iran has issued warnings about unapproved vessel routes—could trigger a sharp price surge.
content: Iran warned on Thursday that vessels not following approved routes would be be dealt with ‘accordingly,’ and a U.N. organization paused ship-evacuation efforts at the strait.

zh.title: 油价面临又一周下跌，但分析师警告荷尔木兹海峡交通缓慢可能再次导致油价飙升
zh.summary: 油价本周面临下行压力，但荷尔木兹海峡潜在的海运中断——伊朗已对未经批准的船舶路线发出警告——可能引发油价急剧上涨。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Sandisk, On Semiconductor, Rocket Lab & more
summary: Stocks including Sandisk, On Semiconductor, and Rocket Lab are posting significant premarket price movements, signaling investor shifts in key semiconductor and aerospace sectors.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨幅最大的股票：闪迪、安森美、火箭实验室等
zh.summary: 包括闪迪、安森美和火箭实验室在内的股票在盘前呈现显著价格波动，预示着投资者在关键半导体和航空航天领域的转变。

title: 'The cult of Elon': SpaceX investors grapple with volatility amid big swings
summary: SpaceX stock has experienced sharp price swings in its first two weeks as a public company, reflecting investor volatility and questions about the company's stability independent of leadership influence.
content: SpaceX stock has seen big spikes and drop in its opening two weeks as a public company.

zh.title: "埃隆的信仰"：SpaceX投资者在大幅波动中难以应对
zh.summary: SpaceX股票在上市后的前两周内经历了大幅波动，反映出投资者对该公司独立于领导力影响下的稳定性的疑虑。

title: Volkswagen plans to cut 15% of its workforce and close four German plants, report says
summary: Volkswagen plans a major restructuring involving the elimination of 100,000 jobs (15% of its workforce) and the closure of four German manufacturing plants in coming years.
content: Auto giant Volkswagen is reportedly planning to cut 100,000 jobs and end production at four German plants over the coming years.

zh.title: 大众汽车计划裁员15%并关闭四家德国工厂，报道称
zh.summary: 大众汽车计划进行重大重组，涉及裁减10万个工作岗位（占员工总数的15%）并在未来几年内关闭四家德国制造工厂。

title: S&P 500 volatility indicators are flashing mixed signals — locking bulls and bears in a tug of war
summary: Mixed volatility signals in the S&P 500, including heavy put-buying activity, indicate investor caution and suggest bulls and bears remain locked in a competitive standoff.
content: Heavy put buying is a cautionary sign. Are the bears about to take control?

zh.title: 标普500波动率指标闪现混合信号——将多头和空头锁定在争夺战中
zh.summary: 标普500中的混合波动信号，包括大量看跌期权购买活动，表明投资者谨慎，暗示多头和空头仍在激烈竞争中陷入僵持。

title: SK Hynix prepares U.S. listing at $166 per share — here's why HSBC says it could be worth 20% more
summary: South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix is preparing a U.S. listing at $166 per share, with HSBC analysts suggesting it could be valued 20% higher. The analysts believe U.S. market entry will narrow SK Hynix's valuation gap with rival Micron Technology.
content: HSBC analysts see the South Korean chipmaker's foray into U.S. markets as the catalyst to narrow the valuation gap with rival Micron Technology.

zh.title: SK海力士以每股166美元价格准备美国上市——汇丰银行为何认为其价值可能高20%
zh.summary: 韩国芯片制造商SK海力士正准备以每股166美元的价格在美国上市，汇丰银行分析师表示其价值可能高20%。分析师认为进入美国市场将缩小SK海力士与竞争对手美光科技之间的估值差距。

title: U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, UN watchdog says
summary: A U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, with the UN's International Atomic Energy Agency confirming that technical inspections have commenced. The development marks a significant step toward implementing the broader agreement.
content: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.

zh.title: 美伊和平协议授予德黑兰核设施访问权，联合国监督机构称
zh.summary: 美伊和平协议授予德黑兰核设施访问权，联合国国际原子能机构确认技术检查已开始。这一发展标志着在实施更广泛协议方面迈出了重要一步。

title: NBA targets Asian resurgence with technology and talent push
summary: The NBA is expanding its presence in Southeast Asia through technology investments and player development initiatives. The region has emerged as one of the league's fastest-growing markets for fan engagement and business opportunity.
content: Southeast Asia has emerged as one of the NBA's fastest-growing markets for fan engagement, making the region a focal point for both player development and business expansion.

zh.title: NBA通过技术和人才推动亚洲复兴
zh.summary: NBA通过技术投资和球员发展计划扩大其在东南亚的影响力。该地区已成为该联赛增长最快的市场之一，在球迷参与和商业机会方面前景广阔。

title: Charity celebrates 50 years of  'transformative' holidays
summary: Sheffield Family Holiday Fund is celebrating 50 years of providing essential holidays for families facing hardship. The charity's program has proven transformative for thousands of families across the region.
content: Sheffield Family Holiday Fund provide much-needed holidays for families facing adversity.

zh.title: 慈善机构庆祝"改变生活"假期50周年
zh.summary: 谢菲尔德家庭假日基金庆祝为面临困难的家庭提供必要假期的50周年。该慈善机构的项目已被证明对该地区数千个家庭产生了改变生活的影响。

title: Goldman says private credit may invest a lot of 'dry powder' in this sector
summary: Goldman Sachs predicts that private credit funds' substantial cash reserves could be deployed to address potential financing market disruptions. The analyst firm identifies this sector as particularly vulnerable to dislocations in credit availability.
content: Private credit may use its sizable amount of "dry powder" to combat potential financing market dislocations in this sector, according to Goldman Sachs.

zh.title: 高盛表示私人信贷可能在该部门投入大量"干粉"
zh.summary: 高盛预计私人信贷基金的大量现金储备可能被用于应对潜在的融资市场中断。该分析公司指出该部门特别容易受到信用可用性中断的影响。

title: Oil slides 2% as markets look past fresh Iran tensions and focus on supply outlook
summary: Oil prices declined 2% on Friday as traders looked past fresh Iran tensions to focus on the broader supply outlook. Markets continue digesting developments from the Middle East while monitoring potential breakthroughs in regional conflicts.
content: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while digesting a flurry of news from the region.

zh.title: 石油下跌2%，市场聚焦供应前景，淡化伊朗紧张局势
zh.summary: 周五油价下跌2%，交易员越过新的伊朗紧张局势，转而关注更广泛的供应前景。市场继续消化来自中东的发展，同时监控地区冲突中可能的突破。

title: Airwallex hits $11 billion valuation with $320 million raise as fintech pushes into finance run by AI agents
summary: Fintech company Airwallex reached an $11 billion valuation with a $320 million funding round to build financial infrastructure for AI-driven business payments. The capital will support expansion as artificial intelligence agents increasingly handle corporate finance operations.
content: Airwallex raised $320 million to build the financial infrastructure powering a world where AI agents handle business payments and finance.

zh.title: Airwallex筹集3.2亿美元融资，估值达110亿美元，因为金融科技推进由AI代理运营的金融业务
zh.summary: 金融科技公司Airwallex通过3.2亿美元融资轮次达到110亿美元估值，为AI驱动的商业支付构建金融基础设施。这笔资金将支持扩展，因为人工智能代理越来越多地处理企业财务运营。

title: The Wall Street equivalent of roster-cut day happens Friday. It’ll be one of the biggest volume days of the year.
summary: FTSE Russell is conducting its semi-annual index rebalancing on Friday, with analysts warning it could be one of the year's highest trading volume days. The reconstitution's scale and scope could significantly impact markets across multiple sectors.
content: FTSE Russell is undertaking its semi-annual rebalancing — what the index provider calls its reconstitution — and the size of the undertaking could impact markets, say analysts.

zh.title: 华尔街相当于"名单削减日"的事件将在周五发生，将是今年交易量最大的日子之一
zh.summary: FTSE Russell将在周五进行其半年度指数再平衡，分析师警告这可能是今年交易量最高的日子之一。这次重构的规模和范围可能会显著影响多个行业的市场。

title: SpaceX FOMO is officially over. Space stocks across the board are getting punished.
summary: Space sector stocks are declining sharply as investors reassess previously lofty valuations across the industry. The sell-off represents a shift from earlier SpaceX-fueled enthusiasm about space technology companies.
content: Investors seem to be having second thoughts about the lofty valuations in the sector, an analyst said.

zh.title: SpaceX的FOMO（错失恐惧心理）正式结束。整个太空行业股票都在被打击
zh.summary: 太空行业股票随着投资者重新评估整个行业之前的高估值而急剧下跌。这次抛售代表了从早期SpaceX推动的对太空技术公司热情的转变。

title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
summary: A UN agency paused its planned evacuation of ships from the Strait of Hormuz following an attack on a container vessel near Oman on Thursday. U.S. officials attributed the attack to Iran, raising tensions despite ongoing peace negotiations.
content: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.

zh.title: 联合国机构在和平协议下首艘船只遇袭后暂停霍尔木兹海峡撤离计划
zh.summary: 联合国机构在周四一艘集装箱船在阿曼附近遭袭后，暂停了其计划中的霍尔木兹海峡船只撤离计划。美国官员将此次袭击归咎于伊朗，尽管和平谈判仍在进行中，但这加剧了紧张局势。

title: SoftBank sinks 11% as Asia tech rout tracks declines in the U.S.
summary: SoftBank Group experienced a significant 11% decline, leading a broader selloff in Asian technology stocks. The decline is driven by mounting concerns about rising artificial intelligence infrastructure costs. This reflects growing investor anxiety about the economic viability of AI investments across the region.
content: SoftBank Group plunged, leading a broad selloff in Asian technology stocks amid mounting concerns over the rising cost of artificial intelligence infrastructure.

zh.title: 软银暴跌11% 亚洲科技股跟随美国下滑
zh.summary: 软银集团下跌11%，引领亚洲科技股更广泛的抛售。此次下跌由人工智能基础设施成本上升引发的担忧推动。这反映了投资者对该地区人工智能投资经济可行性日益加深的忧虑。

title: S&P 500 futures are little changed as index heads for losing week: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite are both tracking toward losses for the week, with futures showing minimal movement. The technology-heavy Nasdaq is particularly affected by the broader market decline. This signals investor concerns about market performance as the trading week concludes.
content: The technology-dominant Nasdaq Composite and broad S&P 500 index are both on pace to end the trading week in the red.

zh.title: 标普500期货基本持平 指数本周走向亏损：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500和纳斯达克综合指数本周均呈下跌趋势，期货涨跌有限。科技股集中的纳斯达克受到更广泛市场下跌的特别影响。随着交易周收盘，这反映了投资者对市场表现的担忧。
